summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations planned; low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled by job permissions. Hydrated open PRs are kept independently for maintainer review or author/proof follow-up; refs without live state are limited to non-mutating needs_human decisions.
